mapper.insert: insert into activity_plan (plan_name, age_group, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{planName}, #{ageGroup}, #{activityCategory}, #{season}, #{duration}, #{scene}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select id, plan_name, age_group, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from activity_plan where id = #{id}

select id, plan_name, age_group, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from activity_plan
and plan_name like concat('%',#{planName},'%')
and status=#{status}
and (season & #{season})!=0
order by create_time desc
